arts.ttl: Preview: Birmingham City vs. Crawley Town - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Friday's League One clash between Birmingham City and Crawley Town, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Tom Brady influence at Birmingham City clear with new investors and transfer moves confirmed
arts.sum: Tom Brady has made his influence clear at Birmingham City, who have confirmed a list of new investors following their defeat by Peterborough at Wembley Stadium on Sunday
